entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for yield and water use efficiency.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS APPLICATION
entities.description: The application of P-fertilizer at levels of 0, 15, 30, 45, and 60 kg P2O5 ha-1.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grain produced per unit area, used as a measure of productivity.

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to the amount of water used (WUE).

entities.name: AGRONOMY PHOSPHORUS USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which the crop utilizes applied phosphorus (APUE).

entities.name: CROP EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The sum of evaporation and plant transpiration (ETc).

entities.name: BIOMASS WUE
entities.description: The water use efficiency calculated based on total biomass production.

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNA ZONE OF NIGERIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the field experiments were conducted.

entities.name: MINJIBIR
entities.description: One of the specific field experiment sites in Nigeria.

entities.name: BUK
entities.description: One of the specific field experiment sites in Nigeria.

entities.name: LOW SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A major constraint to food production in semi-arid environments.

entities.name: WATER SHORTAGE
entities.description: A major constraint to food production and food security.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by low rainfall and high evaporation.

entities.name: LOW-RAINFALL CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system characterized by limited precipitation.

entities.name: DROUGHT PRONE ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An environment susceptible to periods of water deficiency.

entities.name: SPLIT PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used to test P-fertilizer levels and sorghum varieties.

entities.name: CSR01
entities.description: A specific variety of sorghum tested in the study.

entities.name: ICSV400
entities.description: A specific variety of sorghum that showed the highest water use efficiency.

entities.name: LOCAL VARIETY
entities.description: The local sorghum variety used as a control or comparison.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.
